title: As artificial intelligence show off diagnostic chops, scientists reckon with the way forward

title: US Economic Growth Surges Amidst AI Investment and Inflation Challenges
description: The US economy saw an acceleration in growth during the first quarter, driven by investments in artificial intelligence and increased government spending. However, the ongoing Middle East conflict and rising inflation pose potential risks to sustained growth. Consumer spending continues to slow amid high prices and political uncertainties.

title: Tax refunds and AI boom have offset some US economic pain from Iran war and high gas prices, so far
description: Americans are paying for the war in Iran with every visit to the gas station, but some of the damage to the U.S. economy is being offset — for now anyway — by big tax refunds and an investment boom driven by artificial intelligence
